sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ المُعَلِّمُ أَنْ يَعْرِفَ مَنْ يُحِبُّ القِرَاءَةَ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je htio saznati ko voli čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher wanted to know who likes reading.
Half the students raised their hands.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ المُعَلِّمُ: القِرَاءَةُ تَفْتَحُ لَكُمْ بَابَ العَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je rekao: Čitanje vam otvara vrata svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: Reading opens the door of the world for you.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ الطُّلَّابُ كَلَامَهُ وَفَكَّرُوا فِيهِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Učenici su čuli njegove riječi i puno razmišljali o njima.
sentences.translationEn: The students heard his words and thought about them a lot.

sentences.arabic: فِي الأُسْبُوعِ التَّالِي رَفَعَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Sljedeće sedmice većina ih je podigla ruke.
sentences.translationEn: The following week most of them raised their hands.
